creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text: Upon further reflection, I have reworked the patch in a way that preserves both the old and new API that I think won't require any ports changes.  If you have room to still do an exa-run it might be best to make sure it doesn't break anything, or if you have a backlog I can just commit the updated version (kib@ has already ok'd it).  The updated patch is at the same phab URL.
